history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young woman with long, dark hair is shown from the shoulders up, looking to the right with a thoughtful expression. She is wearing a blue and pink Barcelona soccer jersey with the FCB crest and a Spotify logo. She also has a black leather jacket over the jersey and a necklace. The background is a vibrant soccer stadium filled with spectators. The stands are packed with people wearing red and white, and some blue. The green soccer field is visible below, with players in action. A large scoreboard screen is illuminated in the distance. The sky above is a soft blue with scattered clouds. Two heart emojis, one blue and one red, are superimposed in the upper portion of the image. The lighting appears to be natural daylight, possibly late afternoon, casting a soft glow on the scene. The overall mood is one of anticipation and engagement, capturing the atmosphere of a live sporting event. The color palette is dominated by the greens of the field, the blues and reds of the team colors and the crowd, and the neutral tones of the stadium structure and clothing. The image has a slightly grainy, candid feel, as if taken by a spectator.
